page_0217_0.png: Dual-segment status/beacon indicator with top green section showing white exclamation mark (!) for active cautionary state and bottom red section showing white empty circle for inactive/stopped state, used as alarm process state indicator on HMI screens
page_0217_1.png: Analog Meter control with fan-shaped gauge dial showing green safe zones on left and right, black center zone, red needle pointing to current value, and green circular status indicator light in bottom-right corner for real-time process visualization
page_0217_2.png: Cropped Windows system tray IME language mode indicator showing circular clock-style icon split into light blue left segment and red right segment with small tick mark, indicating Chinese input method is active
page_0217_3.png: Analog angular gauge with quarter-circle arc showing green safe zone on left, black zone on right, red needle pointing to current value, black pivot point at bottom-right, green pilot light indicator for running/active status
page_0217_4.png: AVEVA InTouch WindowViewer runtime environment showing Tagname Dictionary with $System folder containing system tags ($Hour, $Minute, $Second, $Day, $Month, $Year), Tagname Dictionary dialog for Tank1_Level tag with Type=Memory Real, and workspace showing tag list
page_0217_5.png: Close-up of purple stylized 3D letter 'T' icon with gradient fill and dark border, likely representing the Trends module or Tag management tool in AVEVA InTouch toolbar
page_0217_6.png: Analog-style clock widget with white face, gray border, hour hand at 12, minute hand at 6 (12:30), second hand at 12, small tick markers at hour positions, for real-time time display on HMI screens
page_0217_7.png: Blue square icon with white summation (Σ) symbol representing mathematical calculation operation, black checkmark indicating expression validation passed, yellow warning triangle with exclamation mark for non-critical advisory notice in tag/expression editor
page_0217_8.png: Gold/metallic 3D serif letter 'T' icon with black rectangular border on white background, representing the Text tool button in AVEVA InTouch WindowMaker toolbar for placing text objects on HMI screens
page_0217_9.png: Tag Browser/Explorer icon showing yellow/orange rounded rectangular data record with blue magnifying glass overlay, representing the tool for browsing, searching, and managing tags in AVEVA InTouch projects
page_0218_0.png: Tools palette with 18 tool buttons in 3-row by 6-column grid including selection, line, rectangle, rounded rectangle, oval, pie chart, polyline, polygon, freehand, bitmap, symbol, group, arc, rounded corner, curved arc, static text, dynamic text, and interactive button tools
page_0218_1.png: Close-up of 'Open' push-button element selected in design mode with blue square selection handles at corners and midpoints, light gray background with thin black border, on grid workspace background for HMI button placement and resizing
page_0218_2.png: Edit Animations dialog for Pushbutton (Button1) with Interaction section showing Pushbutton Enabled, Boolean Reference=Cmd, Action=Set (on press), for configuring button to set Cmd tag to active state when pressed
page_0219.png: Edit Animations dialog showing Show Symbol configuration for Agitator: Reference=CommandPanelWithSetpoint, Has title bar checked, Title=OwningObject, Modal selected, Has close button checked, Position=Below Parent Symbol at 0,0, Size=Relative To Symbol at 100%, for opening command panel popup
page_0220.png: Properties panel for SA_Agitator_Settler showing Runtime Behavior section with TreatAsIcon=True highlighted, Enabled=True, OwningObject=Symbol/SA_Agitator_Settler, Visible=True, ZoomPercent=100, for configuring embedded graphic interaction behavior
page_0221.png: Three runtime control windows side by side: Inlet1_001 (valve with Open/Close buttons, Close highlighted), Pump1_001 (pump with Start/Stop buttons, Stop highlighted), Agitator_001 (agitator with Start/Stop buttons, Stop highlighted, and Speed setpoint input showing 0.00 rpm)
page_0222_0.png: Right-click context menu on canvas showing Paste (Ctrl+V), Select All (F2 grayed), Substitute (submenu arrow), Custom Properties... (Ctrl+M highlighted), Scripts... (F10), Embed Industrial Graphic... (Ctrl+G) options for canvas operations
page_0222_1.png: Edit Custom Properties dialog with + Add custom property button, empty property grid with Name and Default Value columns, right panel with empty Data Type, Default Value, Visibility, Description fields ready for creating new custom property
page_0222_2.png: Custom Properties table showing Cmd property with Default Value=False, selected/highlighted in blue, with + and - buttons for managing properties in the CommandPanel symbol
